### RECENT DECISIONS

Cycle 12: A localized p5 ripple on dark water enters as a continuous gesture, expanding rings catching pale candlelight on a still surface — figurative motion the DOM forms can't carry.
  - addP5Sketch({"position":"bottom-center","size":"large","audio_reactive":true,"code":"\nconst WARM = ['#e8d4a0', '#c4894a', '#8b4a2a', '#f5e6c8', '#d4a574'];\nconst COOL = ['#4a6670', '#8a9ba0'];\nconst SHADOW = ')

Cycle 13: Centroid is climbing sharply on C# — I'll echo the opening moonlight line in a new horizontal-band position with a gentle drift, so the room remembers itself in the bright middle.
  - addSVG({"svg_markup":"<svg viewBox=\"-500 -60 1000 120\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><ellipse cx=\"0\" cy=\"40\" rx=\"480\" ry=\"14\" fill=\"#2a1f14\" opacity=\"0.45\"/><line x1=\"-380\" y1=\"0\" x2)
  - addImage({"query":"moonlight on still water at night, long reflection","position":"right half","motion":{"preset":"breathe","feature":"hijaz_intensity","intensity":0.5}})

Cycle 14: Loose linen enters the room as a soft drifting anchor — its fold catches the falling-but-still-bright phrase on B, breathing alongside the held flame without crowding the muhayyar's afterglow.
  - addImage({"query":"loose linen falling across a dark surface in low light, soft folds","position":"right half","motion":{"preset":"drift","feature":"hijaz_intensity","intensity":0.8},"reactivity":[{"property":)

### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 19 (t=100s): Quiet, falling. Warm timbre. Sparse articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Mid-performance.
Cycle 20 (t=105s): Quiet, falling. Warm timbre. Rapid articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Mid-performance.
Cycle 21 (t=110s): Moderate intensity, rising sharply. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center C# with secondary emphasis on G#. Mid-performance.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: phrase break and quiet descent (Cycle 16 is a deep exhale — dark timbre, very sparse, low centroid. Fade aging material. Allow stillness, then drift through quiet falling cycles with breath on cold glass and a solitary figure receding into dusk.)
Cycle intent: Rising centroid on C# but very sparse onsets. Hold. Perhaps a paletteShift cooling slightly.
Energy hint: rising

### TASK

Emit tool calls per `tools.json` (in the system prefix). Honor the
audited Bayati visual vocabulary. Do not output anything other than
the rationale text block followed by tool calls.
